hero.subtitle: A service for selecting verified tutors with reviews based on many different criteria.

payment.title: Pay after the lesson, no upfront costs
payment.description: You risk nothing. You only pay after your lesson has been successfully completed.

budget.title: Fits any budget
budget.description: We offer teachers at various price points. Simply tell us your budget, and we'll match you with the right tutor.

format.title: Flexible formats
format.description: Study online or in-person with a local teacher. We have tutors available across all cities in Uzbekistan.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our platform.
faq.cta_sub: Our team is happy to help you anytime.
faq.a1: Payment is made directly to the tutor after each lesson. We do not charge students any commission and do not require prepayment on the site.
faq.q2: How is your site different from message boards?
faq.a2: We carefully vet every tutor, verify their diplomas, and collect honest reviews. Our matching system helps you find the perfect teacher specifically for your goals.
faq.q3: How much do your tutors cost?
faq.a3: Prices vary depending on the teacher's experience and the subject. We have both junior specialists and top-tier experts — you will always find an option that fits your budget.
faq.a4: No, using the platform to find a tutor is completely free. You only pay for the lessons themselves.
faq.q5: What languages do the tutors use?
faq.a5: Most lessons are conducted in Uzbek and Russian. We also have many foreign language teachers available.
faq.q6: In which cities are tutors available?
faq.a6: Our tutors work throughout Uzbekistan: Tashkent, Samarkand, Bukhara, and other cities, as well as online worldwide.
